samples.title: Mutual NDA
samples.subtitle: Acme Robotics · Globex Partners
samples.blurb: Short bilateral NDA. The tool surfaces the term, survival period, IP/license stance, governing law, and liability cap — each cited and verified against the page.

samples.title: Employment Agreement
samples.subtitle: Northwind Analytics · Jordan Rivera
samples.blurb: At-will offer. Pulls out the start date, position, salary, IP assignment, and governing law — the details you'd want as a quick reference instead of re-reading.

samples.title: Master Services Agreement
samples.subtitle: Meridian Health · Atlas Advisors
samples.blurb: A consulting MSA billed hourly, with work ordered through individual SOWs. Surfaces the rate, auto-renewal terms, IP ownership, and liability cap — each cited.

samples.title: Statement of Work
samples.subtitle: Phoenix Industries · BlueRiver Consulting
samples.blurb: A fixed-fee data-pipeline migration SOW. Captures the milestone fee schedule, deliverables, kill fee, and termination terms, each cited to the page.

samples.title: SaaS Order Form
samples.subtitle: Brightpath Software · Cascade Retail
samples.blurb: A subscription order form. Pulls the plan and seat count, annual fee, renewal terms, and data-export rights — verified against the source.

samples.title: Contributor License Agreement
samples.subtitle: Open Beacon Foundation
samples.blurb: An open-source CLA. Surfaces the license grant, perpetual term, and as-is warranty disclaimer — the clauses that actually matter, each cited.

samples.title: Engagement Letter
samples.subtitle: Harbor Lane Advisors · Tessellate Media
samples.blurb: A short advisory letter, not a formal contract. Shows the tool adapts to lightweight documents: scope, monthly fee, and effective date, each cited.

samples.title: Commercial Invoice
samples.subtitle: Summit Office Supply · Lakeside Consulting
samples.blurb: Not a contract at all — a billing document. Shows the tool adapts: invoice number, dates, terms, total, and line items, each cited.
